title: Blood Scythe.
description:
Adds a cool Scythe :)

made in MC creator
body:
Adds a Scythe which can be crafted with Metal Rods 

Metal Rods are made by smelting iron

![Iron being smelted into a Metal Rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91260bc4d43b2043c162f59618386073cb07e34.gif)


Aaand this is the crafting recipe 

![Crafting Recipe for the Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c399c557c39c864bad2adb4b1d3c1ecfd46787_0.webp)

Which results in this!

![Holding Scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48e8feb963fab05eceb9719a7652921515a13754.gif)
